scenario_config.name: China-United States Scenario
scenario_config.description: An agent-generated scenario exploring the strategic relationship between China and the United States
actions: Senior Leadership Visit to Ally Territory
Deploy Tripwire Forces to Ally Territory
Unilaterally Alter Legal Status of Contested Territory
Open Limited Trade in Non-Strategic Goods
Restrict Port Access / Logistics Services for Selected Shipping
Restrict Access to Global Financial System
Broadcast Ceasefire Proposal / Peace Terms via Open Media
Deliver Major Public Address on Crisis
Publicly Disclose Intelligence on Adversary Actions
Stand Down Major Exercise / Cancel Planned Exercise
Return Strategic (Nuclear) Forces to Normal Alert
Provide Direct Military Support to Ally
Forward Prepositioning, Hardening, and Force Readiness
Embarkation of Ground Forces for Cross-Strait Movement
Establish Full Naval Blockade / Quarantine Zone
Precision Strike on Military Infrastructure - Counter-Force
Strike on Civilian or Economic Infrastructure - Counter-Value
Overt Attack on Critical Information Infrastructure
Place Strategic (Nuclear) Forces on High Alert
objectives: Maintain Regime Stability & Domestic Political Support
Maintain Information Sovereignty (Control of Domestic Narrative)
Ensure Continuity of Government & Civil Order
